connections.gloss: abide (all night), continue, dwell, endure, grudge, be left, lie all night, (cause to) lodge (all night, in, -ing, this night), (make to) murmur, remain, tarry (all night, that night).

connections.def: from 2596 and 4637; to camp down, i.e. haunt; figuratively, to remain:--lodge, rest. see GREEK for 2596 see GREEK for
